Class DefensiveBack

java.lang.Object
DefensiveBack
All Implemented Interfaces:
FootballPlayer
public class DefensiveBack extends Object implements FootballPlayer
The DefensiveBack class represents a defensive back.

      public DefensiveBack()

    • DefensiveBack

      public DefensiveBack(String name, String nflTeam, int noGamesPlayed, int tackles, int interceptions, int forcedFumbles)
      Parameterized constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - player name
      nflTeam - NFL team
      noGamesPlayed - number of games played
      tackles - number of tackles
      interceptions - number of interceptions
      forcedFumbles - number of forced fumbles
